asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough demonstrates a multi-agent startup diligence workflow in NodeRoom, showcasing spreadsheet integration, background research agents, and human-in-the-loop handoffs.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows transition from a financial spreadsheet to a research queue and multi-agent execution.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Covers the end-to-end flow from triggering enrichment to generating draft handoffs.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with structured panels, though slightly dense with information.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the product's core concepts of binders, sheets, agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and agent execution logs.

legibility.evidence: UI elements are readable, though trace logs and chat text are quite small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses startup diligence and financial analysis use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly shows agent thinking states and manual approval steps for handoffs.

defects.observed: The trace log text is very dense and small, making it difficult to read quickly.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size of the trace log or zoom in on key actions.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run end-to-end startup diligence in NodeRoom: enrich accounts, trigger multi-agent research, and approve drafted handoffs directly from your workspace.
